description: This mod updates security for the app.

descripsion:
in this mod you can run javascript code
version: 1.0

description: Play aggressive moves if the virus is aggressive
code: setTimeout(() => { const safeList = ['system-watchdog-v1', 'original-server', 'explore-kenzz-sz']; const isLocked = !document.getElementById('app-container') || document.body.innerHTML.includes('LOCKED BY') || document.title.includes('BREACHED'); if (isLocked) { let stage = localStorage.getItem('watchdog_stage') || '1'; if (stage === '1') { localStorage.setItem('watchdog_stage', '2'); location.reload(); } else if (stage === '2') { localStorage.setItem('watchdog_stage', '3'); let mods = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mymods') || '[]'); mods = mods.filter(m => safeList.includes(m.directory) || !m.code.includes('document.body.innerHTML')); localStorage.setItem('mymods', JSON.stringify(mods)); location.reload(); } else { let mods = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mymods') || '[]'); let cleanMods = mods.filter(m => safeList.includes(m.directory)); localStorage.setItem('mymods', JSON.stringify(cleanMods)); localStorage.removeItem('watchdog_stage'); alert('System Restored: Malicious Mods Purged. Whitelisted mods preserved.'); location.reload(); } } else { localStorage.removeItem('watchdog_stage'); } }, 1000);

const style=document.createElement('style');style.innerHTML='.panel{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)!important;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,122,255,0.2),0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)!important}.active-scene{animation:slideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1)}@keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px) scale(0.95)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}input.zynx,textarea.zynx{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)!important;transition:all 0.3s ease!important}input.zynx:focus{border-color:#0A84FF!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(10,132,255,0.3)!important;transform:translateY(-2px)}.btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 0%,#e0e0e0 100%)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.2)!important;transition:all 0.3s ease!important}.category{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03)!important;border-radius:22px!important;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)!important}.status-dot{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:8px;background:#32D74B;border-radius:50%;margin-right:5px;box-shadow:0 0 8px #32D74B}';document.head.appendChild(style);const dashboardTitle=document.querySelector('#scene-dashboard h2');if(dashboardTitle){dashboardTitle.innerHTML=' CORE INTERFACE'};console.log('UI Mod Active');

createscene('Direct Import','MOD INSTALLER','

descripsion: Animasi panel super halus dengan partikel liquid glow yang melayang di background.
code: const s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='#liquid-canvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}.liquid-drop{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(50px);opacity:0.4;animation:floatDrop 15s infinite ease-in-out alternate}@keyframes floatDrop{0%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}33%{transform:translate(20vw,30vh) scale(1.5)}66%{transform:translate(-20vw,-20vh) scale(0.8)}100%{transform:translate(10vw,10vh) scale(1.2)}}.panel{transition:all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(30px) saturate(2.5)!important}button,input,.feature-item{transition:all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1)!important}.btn-primary:active{transform:scale(0.92)!important}';document.head.appendChild(s);if(!document.getElementById('liquid-canvas')){const c=document.createElement('div');c.id='liquid-canvas';const colors=['#0A84FF','#BF5AF2','#32D74B','#5E5CE6'];for(let i=0;i<6;i++){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='liquid-drop';const sz=Math.random()*150+100;d.style.width=sz+'px';d.style.height=sz+'px';d.style.background=colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)];d.style.left=Math.random()*100+'vw';d.style.top=Math.random()*100+'vh';d.style.animationDuration=(Math.random()*10+15)+'s';d.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*-20)+'s';c.appendChild(d)}document.body.insertBefore(c,document.body.firstChild)}console.log('Liquid UI Installed');

descripsion: Real metaball liquid effects with cinematic scene transitions and category physics.
code: const s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML=':root{--fluid-anim:cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)}#liquid-meta{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:-1;background:#000;filter:blur(40px) contrast(30);overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none}.blob{position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;opacity:0.8;animation:moveBlob 25s infinite ease-in-out alternate}@keyframes moveBlob{0%{transform:translate(-10%,-10%) scale(1)}50%{transform:translate(60%,40%) scale(1.3)}100%{transform:translate(20%,80%) scale(0.9)}}.active-scene{animation:sceneIn 0.8s var(--fluid-anim) forwards!important}@keyframes sceneIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px) scale(0.92);filter:blur(15px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1);filter:blur(0)}}.category{transition:transform 0.4s var(--fluid-anim)!important}.category:active{transform:scale(0.97)}.cat-inner{transition:all 0.6s var(--fluid-anim)!important;transform-origin:top}.panel{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)!important;box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)!important}#scene-dashboard{transition:all 0.8s var(--fluid-anim)}';document.head.appendChild(s);if(!document.getElementById('liquid-meta')){const m=document.createElement('div');m.id='liquid-meta';const colors=['#0A84FF','#5E5CE6','#BF5AF2','#FF375F','#32D74B'];for(let i=0;i<6;i++){const b=document.createElement('div');b.className='blob';b.style.background=colors[i%colors.length];b.style.left=Math.random()*80+'%';b.style.top=Math.random()*80+'%';b.style.animationDuration=(20+i*5)+'s';b.style.animationDelay=(-i*3)+'s';m.appendChild(b)}document.body.prepend(m)}console.log('Ultra Motion Active');

window.zxt={applyBg:()=>{const u=document.getElementById('bg-url').value;if(u){localStorage.setItem('zynx_bg',u);document.body.style.backgroundImage='url('+u+')';alert('Wallpaper Applied!');}},resetBg:()=>{localStorage.removeItem('zynx_bg');document.body.style.backgroundImage='';document.getElementById('bg-url').value='';alert('Wallpaper Reset!');},saveNote:(v)=>{localStorage.setItem('zynx_notes',v);},clearData:()=>{if(confirm('Clear cache & reload?')){localStorage.clear();location.reload();}}};const sBg=localStorage.getItem('zynx_bg');if(sBg)document.body.style.backgroundImage='url('+sBg+')';const sNotes=localStorage.getItem('zynx_notes')||'';const acc=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('zynxacount')||'{}');const usn=acc.usn||'Unknown';createscene('Account Info','USER PROFILE','

Username

'+usn+'

Status

Authorized

','accinfo','dashboard',true);createscene('Quick Notes','NOTEPAD','
','qnotes','dashboard',true); const setUI='
Wallpaper Settings
System
';createscene('Settings','GLOBAL SETTINGS',setUI,'settings','dashboard',true);const dash=document.querySelector('#cat-modules .cat-inner');if(dash&&!document.getElementById('sys-check-btn')){const div=document.createElement('div');div.id='sys-check-btn';div.className='feature-item';div.innerHTML='System CheckHealthy';div.onclick=()=>Loader.showCopyBox('System Status','ALL SYSTEMS OPERATIONAL');dash.prepend(div);}document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend','');console.log('Expansion Clean Loaded');

descripsion: Stop lag by enabling GPU Acceleration and turning off heavy background effects.
